instruction: Super skill of UX e UI Design integrando Refactoring UI, Laws of UX e Don't Make Me Think. Use for criar ou refatorar interfaces with usabilidade extrema, hierarquia visual impecavel e clareza cognitiva. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Sources - Don't Make Me Think — Steve Krug - Refactoring UI — Steve Schoger & Adam Wathan - Laws of UX — Jon Yablonski

workflow.action: Define hierarchy without colors — just typographic weights, sizes and spacing.
Aplicar paleta cromatica sobre hierarquia ja estabelecida.
Validate singular primary CTA, large buttons, and familiar conventions.
Implementar loading states, errors acionaveis e micro-interactions.
Auditar accessibility e prevencao of errors in flows criticos.

outputContract: Paleta of actions e estados of botao.
Relatorio of accessibility e prevencao of error.
